name: ai-message
title: AI Message
description: User, assistant, or system turn with generated-provenance labelling and draft, streaming, complete, and error states.

props.name: state
props.description: Streaming adds a caret and a hidden "Response in progress"; error tints the bubble and adds a Failed marker.

props.name: author
props.description: Author label. Defaults from the role.

props.name: metadata
props.description: Timestamp or model/version metadata shown beside the author.

props.name: showGeneratedLabel
props.description: Shows the "Generated" badge on assistant turns. Disable only where the product already establishes provenance.

clinicalNotes: Assistant turns carry a "Generated" badge by default. Leave it on: in a chart-adjacent surface, generated text and clinician-authored documentation look identical once copied, and provenance is what lets a reader weight it correctly. A failed turn keeps its place in the transcript with a visible Failed marker instead of vanishing — silently dropping messages destroys the reviewable trail, and audit/revision policy belongs to the consumer, not this component. The streaming state is also announced to assistive tech, so a screen-reader user is not left reading a half-written answer as if it were final.
notes: Sets group/message, so ai-message-actions revealOnHover works without extra wiring.
